description: Create server/routes/sitemap.js with 4 endpoints - /sitemap.xml (index), /sitemap-articles.xml (all published articles), /sitemap-news.xml (Google News - last 48hrs), /sitemap-pages.xml (static pages, location pages). Cache 15 min. Mount in server/index.js.

Update image prompt with golden/warm filter + anti-AI techniques

description: GET /api/admin/dashboard. Total articles (24h/7d/30d), articles per source, error rate, per-source health.
title: Admin API - Dashboard Stats

description: Create server/routes/admin/socialConfig.js. GET/PUT for tone prompt, default hashtags, timing, fallback image. Register in index.js.
title: Social Publishing: Social config API

description: Make PropertyHack serve AU, US, UK, CA markets. See spec/global-platform/
title: Global Platform

description: Add flagEmoji String to Market model. Add country String @default('AU') to LocationSeo with index. Run prisma migrate dev.

description: /api/articles list: s-maxage=300, detail: s-maxage=3600, trending: s-maxage=300, locations/categories/markets: s-maxage=86400, admin: private no-store.
title: T10: Add Cache-Control headers to public API routes

description: Add US_CITIES (20), UK_CITIES (15), CA_CITIES (10) maps. Update mapToKnownLocation() for multi-country. Export getCitiesForCountry(). Return { city, region, country, slug }.
title: T11: Expand locationMapper.ts with US/UK/CA cities

description: New contexts/CountryContext.tsx. Provides { country, setCountry, markets, loading }. Source of truth: URL > preferences > localStorage > IP detection. setCountry navigates + persists.
title: T12: Create CountryContext

description: Update UserPreferences in AuthContext.tsx and useUserPreferences.ts. Update PUT /api/user/profile to accept defaultCountry. No migration needed (JSON field).
title: T13: Add defaultCountry to user preferences type

description: Wrap public routes in /:country param. CountryRedirect at /. Country validation wrapper (invalid → 404). Admin routes unchanged. Wrap app in CountryProvider.
title: T14: Restructure React Router with /:country prefix

description: Returns function that prepends current country to paths. E.g. countryPath('/article/foo') → '/au/article/foo'. Reads from CountryContext.
title: T15: Create useCountryPath hook

description: Leftmost position. Compact pill/dropdown: flag + code. Global option. On change: setCountry, clear location. Global hides location dropdown. Locations scoped to country.
title: T16: Add country selector to FilterBar

description: Read country from CountryContext. Pass country param to useArticles/articleService. Re-fetch when country changes.
title: T17: Update PublicFeed to pass country to API

description: Use useCountryPath for article links.
title: T18: Update ArticleCard with country-prefixed links

description: Use useCountryPath for breadcrumb and related article links.
title: T19: Update ArticleDetail with country-prefixed links

description: Update seed.js to set flagEmoji for AU (🇦🇺), US (🇺🇸), UK (🇬🇧), CA (🇨🇦). Upsert safe to re-run.
title: T2: Seed Market flagEmoji values

description: Use useCountryPath for navigation links.
title: T20: Update Header with country-prefixed nav links

description: Only show AU-specific text when country is AU. Read from CountryContext.
title: T21: Update Footer — conditional AU acknowledgement

description: Read country from URL. Fetch LocationSeo by country + location. City list from LocationSeo for current country. Remove hardcoded AU LOCATIONS array.
title: T22: Update LocationPage for multi-country support

description: Add country to API call params. Pass through to GET /api/articles?country=.
title: T23: Update articleService.ts to accept country param

description: New server/middleware/legacyRedirects.js. 301 redirects: /property-news/:loc → /au/property-news/:loc, /article/:slug → /au/article/:slug, /category/:slug → /au/category/:slug. Register early in middleware chain.
title: T24: Legacy URL redirect middleware

description: Change SITE_URL to https://propertyhack.com. Extract country from URL. Market-aware title/description templates. Remove AU-specific default description.
title: T25: Update crawler SSR — SITE_URL and market-aware meta

description: Inject hreflang link tags for all markets + x-default. Article pages: evergreen gets all 4, country-specific gets only its market + x-default.
title: T26: Add hreflang tags to crawler SSR

description: Every page gets <link rel=canonical> with https://propertyhack.com/:country/... Evergreen articles use their market field as canonical country.
title: T27: Add canonical URLs to crawler SSR

description: Read currency from Market model (AUD/USD/GBP/CAD). Set priceCurrency in structured data based on page country.
title: T28: Update JSON-LD with market currency

description: /sitemap.xml becomes index. /:country/sitemap.xml for market articles + evergreen + location pages. /:country/news-sitemap.xml for last 48h. Keep /sitemap-pages.xml.
title: T29: Per-country sitemaps

description: 11 new IngestionSource records (4 US, 4 UK, 3 CA) — all isActive: false, type rss. See spec F9 for full list.
title: T3: Seed inactive ingestion sources for US/UK/CA

description: Location pages under /:country/property-news/:location get country-scoped meta. Read LocationSeo by country + location.
title: T30: Update LocationPage SEO in crawler SSR

description: Add trusted_proxies cloudflare directive. Ensure origin TLS works with Cloudflare Full (Strict) mode.
title: T31: Update Caddyfile for Cloudflare

description: Create docs/cloudflare-setup.md. DNS migration, SSL mode, Redirect Rules for ccTLDs, Cache Rules for API, Page Rules. Ops documentation for manual setup.
title: T32: Document Cloudflare setup steps

description: Ensure all existing AU LocationSeo records have country: AU. Verify slugs match locationMapper format.
title: T33: Backfill AU LocationSeo country field

description: Test city lookups for all 4 countries. Unknown city returns null. getCitiesForCountry returns correct list.
title: T34: Unit tests — locationMapper

description: ?country=US returns US + evergreen. ?country=AU returns AU + evergreen. No param returns all. Country + location combo. Country + search + category combo.
title: T35: Integration tests — article API country filter

description: /api/markets returns 4 active markets with flagEmoji. /api/locations?country=UK returns UK locations.
title: T36: Integration tests — markets and locations endpoints

description: Visit / → redirect to detected country. Switch country → URL updates. Old URL → 301 redirect. Location page for non-AU city.
title: T37: E2E tests — country switching and routing

description: View source has correct hreflang. /:country/sitemap.xml valid XML. Canonical URLs correct for country-specific and evergreen articles.
title: T38: E2E tests — SEO verification

description: 20 US, 15 UK, 10 CA city records. Each with country, location slug, title, description, h1, introText. Backfill existing AU records with country: AU.

description: Duplicate existing AU categories with market set to US/UK/CA. Same names and slugs, different market values.
title: T5: Seed ArticleCategory records for US/UK/CA

description: New route server/routes/public/markets.js. Returns active markets from Market table. Cache-Control: public, s-maxage=86400. Register in Express.
title: T6: Public markets endpoint — GET /api/markets

description: Accept country query param (AU/US/UK/CA/GLOBAL). When set: WHERE (market = country OR isEvergreen = true). Works with existing search/location/category/date filters. Both Prisma and vector search paths.
title: T7: Add country filter to GET /api/articles

description: Same filtering logic as T7 applied to trending endpoint.
title: T8: Add country filter to GET /api/articles/trending

description: Accept country query param. Return only LocationSeo records matching that country. Fall back to all if no param.
title: T9: Add country filter to GET /api/locations

description: Create server/services/fetchers/manualFetcher.js. Accept URL, fetch page, extract content with cheerio. Accept direct content (admin writes article). Add cheerio dependency.
title: Manual Entry Fetcher

description: 5 interactive property calculators (mortgage, stamp duty, rental yield, borrowing power, rent vs buy) with user registration (email/password + Google OAuth), profile with default filters, saved scenarios dashboard, and newsletter integration. See spec/property-calculators/ for full spec.
title: Property Calculators & User Auth

description: Extend User model: add role, googleId, avatarUrl, emailVerified, otpCode, otpExpiresAt, otpPurpose, newsletterOptIn, preferences. Make passwordHash nullable. Add SavedScenario model with CalculatorType enum. Create Prisma migration. Data migration script: set role='admin' for users where superAdmin=true.
title: T1: Prisma Schema — User Model Extension + SavedScenario

description: Extend server/routes/auth.js: POST /api/auth/register, verify-email, resend-otp, forgot-password, reset-password. Modify existing login to remove superAdmin gate. Rate limits. Depends on T1, T2, T3, T4.
title: T5: Auth Routes — Registration + Email Verification + Password Reset

description: Create server/passport.js with passport-google-oauth20 strategy. Add passport.initialize() to server/index.js. Add GET /api/auth/google and /api/auth/google/callback routes. Handle linking existing email accounts. Google users get emailVerified=true. Depends on T1, T2.
title: T6: Google OAuth — Passport Setup + Routes

description: Create server/calculators/rentVsBuyCalculator.js. Uses mortgage calculator for repayments, stamp duty calculator for buying costs (NSW default). 30-year simulation, breakeven year detection, summary statement, chart data (two lines). Unit tests. Depends on T13, T14.
title: T17: Rent vs Buy Calculator Engine

description: Create AuthContext.tsx. Refactor App.tsx to use it. Update LoginPage (add Google, forgot password, signup links, remove admin-only assumption). Create RegisterPage, VerifyEmailPage, ForgotPasswordPage, ResetPasswordPage, GoogleAuthCallback. Split RequireAuth into RequireAuth + RequireAdmin. Update authService.ts. Add all routes. Depends on T5, T6.
title: T7: Frontend Auth — AuthContext + Login/Register Pages

description: Create server/routes/user/profile.js: GET/PUT /api/user/profile, PUT password, PUT newsletter toggle, DELETE account (cascade scenarios, unsubscribe Beehiiv). Register in server/index.js. Input validation. Depends on T1, T2, T3, T4.
title: T8: Profile API Routes

description: Create server/routes/public/calculators.js: POST endpoints for all 5 calculators. Input validation with express-validator. Calculator rate limiter 60 req/min. Register in server/index.js. Integration tests. Depends on T13, T14, T15, T16, T17.
title: T18: Calculator API Routes

description: Create components/user/ProfilePage.tsx: account section, change password, news preferences (location/categories/date range), newsletter toggle, saved scenarios link, account deletion with confirmation modal. Create services/userService.ts, hooks/useUserPreferences.ts. Add /profile route. Depends on T7, T8.
title: T9: Profile Frontend

description: Modify HomePage.tsx to read user preferences from AuthContext and pass as initialFilters to FilterBar. Modify FilterBar to accept optional initialFilters prop and apply on mount. Depends on T9.
title: T10: Homepage Preference Integration

description: Modify Header.tsx: add Tools dropdown nav (desktop hover, mobile collapsible) + user menu (anonymous: Sign In; authenticated: avatar dropdown with Profile, Saved Scenarios, Sign Out; admin: + Admin Panel). Modify Footer.tsx: add Tools section. Depends on T7.
title: T11: Header & Footer Updates

description: Create components/calculators/shared/: CurrencyInput, SliderInput, PercentageInput, ExpandableSection, ResultCard, ShareButton, SaveScenarioButton. Create services/calculatorService.ts, hooks/useCalculator.ts. Install recharts. WCAG 2.1 AA compliant. Depends on T18.
title: T19: Shared Calculator Components

description: Create server/services/emailService.js. Implement sendWelcomeEmail, sendVerificationOtp, sendPasswordResetOtp. HTML email templates (inline). Uses RESEND_API_KEY and RESEND_FROM_EMAIL env vars.
title: T3: Email Service — Resend Integration

description: Create MortgageCalculator.tsx + CalculatorLayout.tsx (shared two-column layout). Inputs: price, deposit (AUD/% toggle), loan term slider, interest rate, P&I/IO toggle, frequency. Outputs: headline repayment, totals, LVR, LMI warning. Recharts stacked area amortisation chart. Expandable yearly table. Meta tags + JSON-LD. Depends on T19.
title: T20: Mortgage Calculator Page

description: Create StampDutyCalculator.tsx. Inputs: price, state select, buyer type, property type, primary residence toggle, VIC off-the-plan checkbox. Outputs: headline duty, concession notes, upfront cost, effective rate. Meta tags + JSON-LD. Depends on T19.
title: T21: Stamp Duty Calculator Page

description: Create RentalYieldCalculator.tsx. Inputs: purchase price, weekly rent; advanced expenses section. Outputs: headline gross yield %, net yield, annual income/expenses. Recharts bar chart. Benchmark note. Meta tags + JSON-LD. Depends on T19.
title: T22: Rental Yield Calculator Page

description: Create BorrowingPowerCalculator.tsx. Inputs: applicant toggle (1/2), incomes, expenses; liabilities section, dependants, assessment rate. Conditional second applicant. Outputs: headline max borrowing, repayment, deposit at 80%/90% LVR. Visual bar/gauge. Disclaimer. Meta tags + JSON-LD. Depends on T19.
title: T23: Borrowing Power Calculator Page

description: Create RentVsBuyCalculator.tsx. Inputs: price, rent, deposit, rate, term, growth/rent increase/investment return rates. Outputs: headline breakeven year, summary statement, net position at intervals. Recharts two-line chart. Expandable year-by-year table. Meta tags + JSON-LD. Depends on T19.
title: T24: Rent vs Buy Calculator Page

description: Create ToolsIndex.tsx — landing page at /tools. Card grid with all 5 calculators (icon, name, description, link). Meta tags for SEO. Add route to App.tsx. Depends on T19.
title: T25: Tools Index Page

description: Create server/routes/public/scenarios.js: GET list (with type/search filters), POST create (100 limit), GET single, PUT rename, POST duplicate, DELETE. All verify ownership (return 404 not 403). Register in server/index.js with authenticateToken. Integration tests. Depends on T1, T2.
title: T26: Scenario API Routes

description: Create ScenarioDashboard.tsx: card/list view sorted by recent, calculator type badges (colour-coded), headline results, date. Filter by type (tag buttons), search by name. Actions: Open (navigate to calculator), Rename (inline), Duplicate, Delete (confirmation). Create services/scenarioService.ts. Add /profile/scenarios route. Depends on T19, T26.
title: T27: Scenario Dashboard Frontend

description: Update SaveScenarioButton to call scenario API on save. Update useCalculator hook to detect ?scenario=:id param, fetch scenario, populate inputs from saved data, display saved outputs. Toast on save. Depends on T20, T21, T22, T23, T24, T26, T27.
title: T28: Calculator — Save + Restore Integration

description: Add /tools and all 5 calculator URLs to server/routes/sitemap.js. Extend server/middleware/crawlerSsr.js for /tools/* routes. Verify JSON-LD renders for crawlers. Depends on T20, T21, T22, T23, T24, T25.
title: T29: Calculator SEO — Sitemaps + Crawler SSR

description: Create server/services/beehiivService.js. Implement subscribe(email) and unsubscribe(email) via Beehiiv API. Uses BEEHIIV_API_KEY and BEEHIIV_PUBLICATION_ID env vars. Graceful error handling — newsletter failure should not block registration.
title: T4: Beehiiv Service

description: Playwright tests: registration flow, Google OAuth (mocked), calculator flow (inputs → results → share → restore), save scenario flow (calculate → save → dashboard → open → verify), account deletion, profile preferences → homepage filter application. Depends on T28, T29.
title: T30: E2E Tests

description: Create server/config/calculators/ with stampDutyBrackets.json (all 8 states/territories, current brackets, FHB thresholds, foreign surcharges, VIC off-the-plan), hemTable.json (HEM by income bracket/dependants/single-couple), hecsThresholds.json (ATO repayment thresholds). Research and populate with current 2025-26 Australian data.
title: T12: Calculator Config Data

description: Create server/calculators/mortgageCalculator.js. P&I amortisation formula, Interest Only, weekly/fortnightly/monthly frequency conversion, LVR + LMI warning, year-by-year amortisation chart data. All monetary values in integer cents. Unit tests with known input/output pairs.
title: T13: Mortgage Calculator Engine

description: Create server/calculators/rentalYieldCalculator.js. Gross and net yield with itemised expenses, management fees as % of rent, chart data for gross vs net bar chart. Unit tests.
title: T15: Rental Yield Calculator Engine

description: Add optionalAuth middleware to server/middleware/auth.js. Export alongside existing exports. Update authenticateToken to select new User fields (role, emailVerified, avatarUrl). Depends on T1.
title: T2: Auth Middleware — optionalAuth + RequireAdmin Split

description: Create server/calculators/stampDutyCalculator.js. Load brackets from config JSON. Walk bracket array, first home buyer exemption/concession, foreign surcharge, VIC off-the-plan. Total upfront cost. Unit tests verified against official state calculator results. Depends on T12.
title: T14: Stamp Duty Calculator Engine

description: Create server/calculators/borrowingPowerCalculator.js. Net income estimation, HEM floor from config, HECS repayment from config, credit card 3% commitment, APRA +3% buffer, max borrowing iterative solve, deposit at 80%/90% LVR. Unit tests. Depends on T12.
title: T16: Borrowing Power Calculator Engine

description: Create server/services/socialPostGenerationService.js that uses Gemini to generate social media posts (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram) from an article's title, shortBlurb, longSummary, and sourceUrl. Use the existing SystemPrompt DB table for an editable social-generation prompt. Generate platform-appropriate content with hashtags, emojis, and article link.
title: Add AI social post generation service

Enable pgvector, add embedding vector(1536) column with IVFFlat index.

The image gen prompt should be stored with name='image-generation' and contain the full prompt template from imageGenerationService.js.

Ensure directory is created on startup. Add static file serving middleware in server/index.js. Image filenames should be article slug + .png. This is a simple v1 approach - can move to CDN/S3 later.

description: Seed known embeddings. Verify semantic relevance, similarity ordering, combined filters, related articles, empty results.

description: Design and test the image generation prompt template that produces consistent editorial illustrations matching PropertyHack branding. Requirements: 1) Flat/geometric illustration style, NOT photorealistic photos. 2) Consistent colour palette incorporating cream, charcoal, and gold accent tones. 3) Property/architecture themed visual elements appropriate to article category (residential=houses, commercial=buildings, finance=charts/coins, policy=government buildings, etc). 4) Clean composition suitable for 16:9 card thumbnails. 5) No text in images. 6) Test with multiple article types to verify consistency. Store the prompt template as a configurable string in the service.
title: Image Prompt Engineering for Brand Consistency

description: Create a one-time script server/scripts/backfill-images.js that: 1) Finds all PUBLISHED articles with null imageUrl. 2) Queues each to the article-image queue for processing. 3) Logs progress. Run after the image generation pipeline is deployed to populate images for the ~55 existing articles.
title: Backfill Images for Existing Articles

description: Update imageGenerationService.js to read the image generation prompt template from the SystemPrompt table (name='image-generation') instead of using hardcoded strings. Fall back to the hardcoded prompt if DB lookup fails. Cache the prompt in memory with a 5-min TTL so we don't hit the DB on every image generation.
title: Wire Image Service to DB Prompt

description: Create server/services/imageGenerationService.js that uses Google's Imagen 3 API (via @google/generative-ai SDK, same as our Gemini setup) to generate article illustrations. The service should: 1) Accept article title, shortBlurb, and category as input. 2) Auto-generate an image prompt that produces consistent editorial illustration style - flat/geometric art, not photorealistic - using our brand palette (cream #f0f0f0, black #2b2b2b, gold #d4b038 accents). 3) Call Imagen 3 to generate a 1024x576 (16:9) image. 4) Upload the result to a storage location (start with saving base64 and serving from Express, can move to S3/Cloudinary later). 5) Return the image URL. Include error handling and fallback to placeholder.
title: Image Generation Service (Google Imagen 3)

description: GET /api/categories crashes with Prisma error: Argument not must not be null. The route at server/routes/public/categories.js uses findMany with distinct: ['category'] combined with a where clause that has 'not: null' which is invalid in Prisma 6. Fix: use raw SQL SELECT DISTINCT or fix the Prisma query syntax.
title: BUG: /api/categories returns 500 - Prisma distinct+orderBy incompatibility
